scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.setup: npm ci && npm ci --prefix apps/api && npm ci --prefix apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.format:check:phase1: npm run format:check:root && npm run format:check:api && npm run format:check:web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.check:phase1: npm run lint && npm run format:check:phase1 && npm run test && npm run smoke
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check:phase1 && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke
